page_content: Classics is a pre-professional major for law school or for graduate school in any aspect of the ancient world. Classics majors have also gone on to medical school and library school. Latin teachers are in demand and numerous students have found rewarding jobs teaching secondary school, with continued involvement in the Classics community. Others have gone into business or gotten jobs in (among other ﬁelds) professional writing or editing, archival work, government services, academic administration, information technology, or social services.
